description: Prompt assembly + bindings-hash determinism goldens (state-hash caching).

cases.protects: Identical bindings → identical static block hash; golden byte compare of canonical hash input and static prefix.

profile.charter: You are a patient tutor. Stay within elementary scope.

protocol.instructions: Use thought/answer fences. Never invent citations.

Never invent citations.","protocolVersion":"1.0.0"},"subjectId":"anika-k"}

### charter

version: 1.0.0

### profile

<<<END_SUTRA_PROMPT_STATIC>>>

### memories
